title: iodes scandens
intro: Iodes scandens, also known as Scandent Iodine-wort, is a plant species that belongs to the family Cunoniaceae and is native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high iodine content, which makes it a natural remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Iodes scandens include its ability to support thyroid function, boost immune system, and act as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Iodes scandens can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
